name: thoth

runtime.help_excerpt: top-level parser

description: top-level binary

name: --verbose

runtime.help_excerpt: Verbose logging

description: Verbose logging

name: --json

runtime.help_excerpt: Emit JSON when the selected command supports structured output

description: Emit JSON when the selected command supports structured output

name: --robot-triage

runtime.help_excerpt: Emit agent quick-ref, health, commands, and exit-code contract as JSON

description: Emit agent quick-ref, health, commands, and exit-code contract as JSON

name: --bookmarks

runtime.help_excerpt: Bookmarks JSON file (default: %(default)s)

description: Bookmarks JSON file (default: %(default)s)

runtime.help_excerpt:
usage: thoth.py archivist [-h] [--topics TOPICS] [--limit LIMIT] [--force]
                          [--dry-run] [--benchmark]
                          [--benchmark-top BENCHMARK_TOP] [--json]

usage: thoth.py arxiv [-h] [--discover] [--source {api,rss}] [--topics TOPICS]
                      [--categories CATEGORIES] [--feed-format {rss,atom}]
                      [--limit LIMIT]

usage: thoth.py async-test [-h] [--limit LIMIT] [--concurrent CONCURRENT]
                           [--timeout TIMEOUT]
usage: thoth.py capabilities [-h] [--json]
usage: thoth.py db [-h] {stats,vacuum,export} ...
usage: thoth.py delete [-h] [--dry-run] [--yes] tweet_id

usage: thoth.py digest [-h] [--week WEEK] [--notify] [--ntfy-topic NTFY_TOPIC]
                       [{weekly,inbox,dashboard,all}]
usage: thoth.py github-stars [-h] [--limit LIMIT] [--no-resume]

usage: thoth.py huggingface-likes [-h] [--limit LIMIT] [--no-resume]
                                  [--no-models] [--no-datasets] [--no-spaces]
usage: thoth.py ingest-queue [-h] [--limit LIMIT]
usage: thoth.py migrate-filenames [-h] [--dry-run] [--analyze]
usage: thoth.py migrate-frontmatter [-h] [--dry-run]

usage: thoth.py pipeline [-h] [--limit LIMIT] [--use-cache] [--no-resume]
                         [--batch-size BATCH_SIZE] [--tweet-ids TWEET_IDS]
                         [--rerun-llm] [--dry-run] [--llm-only]

usage: thoth.py process [-h] [--limit LIMIT] [--use-cache] [--no-resume]
                        [--no-skip-cached] [--dry-run]
usage: thoth.py robot-docs [-h] {guide} ...

usage: thoth.py social [-h] [--sync] [--github-user GITHUB_USER]
                       [--hf-user HF_USER] [--limit LIMIT]
usage: thoth.py stats [-h] [--json]
usage: thoth.py triage [-h] [--json]

usage: thoth.py twitter-transcripts [-h] [--limit LIMIT] [--no-resume]
                                    [--verbose]
usage: thoth.py update-videos [-h] [--no-resume] [--no-tweets] [--no-threads]
usage: thoth.py web-clipper [-h]
usage: thoth.py wiki-lint [-h] [--stale-after-days STALE_AFTER_DAYS] [--json]

usage: thoth.py wiki-query [-h] [--limit LIMIT] [--write-back]
                           [--selected-slugs SELECTED_SLUGS]
                           [--curated-notes CURATED_NOTES] [--title TITLE]
                           [--json]
                           query

usage: thoth.py x-api-sync [-h] [--max-results MAX_RESULTS]
                           [--max-pages MAX_PAGES] [--no-resume]

usage: thoth.py youtube [-h] [--limit LIMIT] [--no-resume] [--no-embeddings]
                        [--no-transcripts]

name: --topics

runtime.help_excerpt: Comma-separated archivist topic IDs to compile

description: Comma-separated archivist topic IDs to compile

name: --limit

runtime.help_excerpt: Maximum number of topics to evaluate

description: Maximum number of topics to evaluate

name: --force

runtime.help_excerpt: Run selected topics even if the dirty check says they are up to date

description: Run selected topics even if the dirty check says they are up to date

name: --dry-run

runtime.help_excerpt: Evaluate topics without calling the LLM or writing wiki pages

description: Evaluate topics without calling the LLM or writing wiki pages

name: --benchmark

runtime.help_excerpt: Evaluate retrieval only and print candidate diagnostics without compiling pages

description: Evaluate retrieval only and print candidate diagnostics without compiling pages

name: --benchmark-top

runtime.help_excerpt: Number of top candidate paths to print per topic during --benchmark

description: Number of top candidate paths to print per topic during --benchmark
